warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Staff Only: Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Executive Summary
criteria.description: Present an Executive Summary that is short and to the point. Its purpose is to persuade the reader that the business idea is viable and has a good likelihood of succeeding.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: An Executive Summary is not included.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: An Executive Summary is present, but it fails to demonstrate either a solid business concept or a plausible path to success.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The Executive Summary is included and clearly indicates a robust business concept along with a strong potential for success.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The Executive Summary functions as an effective opening, smoothly leading into the subsequent sections of the report.

criteria.name: Develop Company Profile
criteria.description: Detail the company's legal structure, its operational start date, mission statement or vision, governance framework, physical locations, short-term development objectives, and a summary of its financial condition.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the profile.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Present Industry Analysis
criteria.description: Provide an analysis of the industry, including its scale, growth trajectory, and historical background, along with current trends and strategic opportunities within it.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the analysis.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Present Target Market
criteria.description: Define the target market by its size, growth, potential, and needs. Include an effective analysis of its potential, current purchasing patterns, and sensitivities.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the market presentation.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Discuss Competition
criteria.description: Identify key competitors, thoroughly analyze their strengths and weaknesses, consider potential future competitors, and outline barriers to entry for new market participants.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the competitive discussion.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Marketing Plan & Sales Strategy
criteria.description: Identify the core message to be conveyed, analyze various options for message delivery including web-based processes, and define sales procedures and methods.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the marketing and sales plan.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Operations
criteria.description: Describe the business facilities, define and analyze the production plan, define and analyze the workforce plan, and consider the impact of technology.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the operations section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Management & Organization
criteria.description: Identify and describe key employees and principals, the Board of Directors, advisory committee, consultants, and other human resources. Outline a plan for identifying, recruiting, and securing key participants, and detail the compensation and incentives plan.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the management and organization section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Provide Long-term Development
criteria.description: Identify and document goals for three, five, or more years. Identify and analyze risks and potential negative outcomes, and present a strategy to achieve these long-term goals.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the long-term development section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Financials
criteria.description: Identify the type of accounting system to be used. Include and ensure the reasonableness of financial projections, specifically monthly cash flow for Year 1, monthly income statement for Year 1, and yearly income statements for Years 1, 3, and 5.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Multiple required elements are missing from the financials section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more of the required elements are either not present or are only partially explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Every required element is sufficiently detailed and supported by relevant documentation.

criteria.name: Substantiates and cites sources used while conducting research
criteria.description: Verify and reference all sources utilized during the research process.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No sources are referenced.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Statements are rarely supported by cited sources or references.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Professionally credible sources and resources are generally provided to back up statements.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Compelling evidence from professionally credible sources and resources is consistently provided to support statements.

criteria.name: Format and design a business report
criteria.description: Organize and visually arrange the business report.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The document lacks proper formatting.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Formatting is inconsistent, there is excessive empty space, and/or unrelated images or photographs are included.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The report maintains a consistent formatting style throughout.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The report uses full bleed, makes effective use of space, includes relevant and well-defined graphics, and maintains consistent formatting.

criteria.name: Include correct grammar, punctuation, and spelling
criteria.description: Ensure the use of proper grammar, punctuation, and spelling.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: There are 5 or more errors in grammar, punctuation, or spelling.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: There are 3-4 errors in grammar, punctuation, or spelling.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: There are no spelling errors, and no more than 2 grammar or punctuation errors.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: There are no spelling errors, and no more than 1 grammar or punctuation error.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The report must be submitted as a PDF, without the use of links or QR codes (except in citations). It must be 17 pages or less, follow the sequence of the rating sheet, and be formatted for 8 1/2" x 11" paper. A cover page with all listed criteria and a table of contents must be included, all pages must be numbered, and the business must not have been in operation for more than 12 months.

levels.label: Competitor(s) Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) failed to adhere to the guidelines.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: All specified conditions are met: The report was submitted as a PDF, links or QR codes were not used (unless in citations), the report was 17 pages or under, it followed the sequence of the rating sheet and was formatted for 8 1/2" x 11" paper, a cover page with all criteria listed and a table of contents were included, all pages were numbered, and the business had not been in operation for longer than 12 months.

criteria.name: Describes business concept and company profile
criteria.description: Explain the core business idea and the company's profile.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No information is provided regarding the business concept or company profile.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the business concept OR the company profile is described.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both the business concept AND the company profile are explained.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The business concept and company profile are explained, including how the concept aligns with the profile.

criteria.name: Explains marketing aspects of business
criteria.description: Elaborate on the marketing elements of the business.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No marketing information is evident.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One marketing aspect is explained.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Two marketing aspects are explained.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three or more marketing aspects are explained to enhance the company's presentation.

criteria.name: Describes operations and management plans
criteria.description: Detail the plans for the company's operations and management.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No information is provided regarding the company, operations plan, or management plan.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A description of either the operations plan OR the management plan is provided.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A description of both the operations plan AND the management plan is provided.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A detailed description of operations and management is provided, including a plan for future growth.

criteria.name: Provides information on financial documents and projections
criteria.description: Supply details regarding financial documents and projections.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No information is provided regarding financial documents or company projections.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Information is provided for at least one financial document OR one projection.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Information is provided for two financial documents and at least one projection.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Information is provided for at least three financial documents and at least three projections.

criteria.name: Identifies and analyzes risks and adverse results and provides plan to avoid adverse results
criteria.description: Recognize and evaluate potential risks and negative outcomes, then provide a strategy to prevent these adverse results.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No evidence of risks or adverse results is presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One risk OR adverse result is mentioned, but no planning is evident.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Two risks and at least one adverse result are identified; a plan with at least one step to avoid adverse results is included.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three risks and at least one adverse result are identified; a plan with at least two steps to avoid adverse results is included.

criteria.name: Identifies long-term goals
criteria.description: Establish the company's long-range objectives.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No goals are identified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Only one goal is identified.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Two goals are identified.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three or more goals are identified, along with a specific plan to achieve them.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: Ensure that all statements are structured logically and communicated clearly.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear prepared.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation flow was not logical.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation proceeded in a logical sequence.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation proceeded in a logical sequence, and all statements were well organized.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Regularly exhibit self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, and effective vocal projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified skills were demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: 1-2 of the specified skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: 3 of the specified skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified skills were demonstrated, enhancing the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Show proficiency in answering questions thoroughly.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Questions are not answered, or responses are completely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Answers are incomplete or unclear, indicating a limited grasp of the topic.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Most questions are answered accurately and clearly, showing adequate comprehension.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Answers are delivered confidently, clearly, accurately, and thoughtfully, improving the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: Only permitted technology devices were used (adhering to sizing specifications; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at any time). Professional boundaries were maintained during setup (no interaction with judges). No materials were left behind after the presentation. Links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges). Audio was presented without external speakers (in the preliminary round). The use of food or live animals was avoided.

levels.label: Competitor(s) Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) failed to adhere to the guidelines.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: All specified conditions are met: Only permitted technology devices were used (adhering to sizing specifications; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at any time); professional boundaries were maintained during setup (no interaction with judges); no materials were left behind after the presentation; links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges); audio was presented without external speakers (in the preliminary round); and the use of food or live animals was avoided.
